title: 目標達成の後に・ドン底から上を

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making consistent efforts to eat and bulk
up, Tamamo Cross just about manages to achieve
an athletic body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her body still isn't strong enough to
take on the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although frustrated, she raises her head,
determined to win against a certain racer from
the regionals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tamamo Cross promises her family that
she'll give her all, we decide that our goal is to
place third or higher in four graded races by
January of her senior year.
